description: After a recent website migration, some inline images on the blog post 'Exploring Modern Architecture Masterpieces' are broken because they point to the old domain (`http://legacy-site.local`). Fix the post by replacing the broken image blocks with the recovered files located in `/home/ga/Documents/recovered_media/` (`guggenheim.jpg`, `bauhaus.jpg`, `fallingwater.jpg`). Assign the following exact Alternative Text to the images: 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao' (guggenheim.jpg), 'Bauhaus Dessau Building' (bauhaus.jpg), and 'Fallingwater House' (fallingwater.jpg). Ensure the post is saved and no longer contains any legacy URLs.
